gist.headline: The Swiss army hive
gist.blurb: Worl Tools just dropped into the ecosystem. It's an offline-first desktop app packing 20+ utilities—from AI image editing to dev tools—all in one place.
gist.summary: Added Worl Tools, a comprehensive offline-first desktop application featuring over 20 utilities, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: The community can now discover Worl Tools in the app directory, expanding the ecosystem of tools built with Pollinations.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds 'Worl Tools', a desktop app with 20+ utilities. Visual metaphor: a glowing toolbox or a Swiss army knife of digital tools. Characters: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot discovering a retro toolbox overflowing with tiny pixel tools (wrenches, paintbrushes, gears).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor-head robot exploring a glowing retro toolbox overflowing with tiny pixelated tools like wrenches, paintbrushes, and gears. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor-head robot exploring a glowing retro toolbox overflowing with tiny pixelated tools like wrenches, paintbrushes, and gears.
